Here's the implementation plan:

1. First, we need to set up the database connection in src/db/index.ts
2. Then create the user model in src/models/user.ts
3. Add the API routes in src/routes/api.ts
4. Finally, write tests in test/api.test.ts

The main files to modify are:
- src/db/index.ts
- src/models/user.ts
- src/routes/api.ts
